title: DatabaseCreateRequest
description: Request body for creating a new database on the SAP ASE server.

name.description: The name for the new database.

deviceName.description: The name of the database device for data storage.

sizeMB.description: The initial size of the database in megabytes.

logDeviceName.description: The name of the device for the transaction log.

logSizeMB.description: The initial size of the transaction log in megabytes.
